events.text: Danilo (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Marcelo Brozovic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Casemiro (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Marquinhos (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Croatia 0, Brazil 1. Neymar (Brazil) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Lucas Paquetá.
Goal!  Croatia 1, Brazil 1. Bruno Petkovic (Croatia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mislav Orsic.
Bruno Petkovic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
